meta.generated_from: Merged: Master Exhibit Roster (exhibit lists) + Pilot Run Prompts (element maps) + X-6/X-7 corrections
meta.notes: Runtime-ready. Keys are task_ids matching runner.py/gates.py/scorer.py. X-6 added to II/IV/V element maps. X-7 corrected from irrelevant to relevant for V.

element_definitions.actual_knowledge: Official with authority to address harassment had actual knowledge of the alleged harassment
element_definitions.clearly_unreasonable: The official's response was clearly unreasonable in light of known circumstances
element_definitions.severe_pervasive: The harassment was so severe, pervasive, and objectively offensive that it denied equal educational access
element_definitions.denial_of_access: The harassment effectively denied plaintiff equal access to educational programs or activities

deliberate_indifference.cross_count_pair_elements: (1) Qualified individual with disability; (2) Notice of disability and need for accommodation; (3) Request for reasonable accommodation; (4) Denial of accommodation; (5) Resulting harm

element_definitions.protected_activity: Plaintiff engaged in activity protected under Title IX (reporting, opposing, or participating in proceedings)
element_definitions.adverse_action: Defendant took an action that would deter a reasonable person from engaging in protected activity
element_definitions.causal_connection: A causal link exists between the protected activity and the adverse action

retaliation_claim.cross_count_pair_elements: (1) False representation of material fact; (2) Scienter (knowledge of falsity or reckless disregard); (3) Intent to induce reliance; (4) Justifiable reliance; (5) Resulting damages

element_definitions.qualified_individual: Plaintiff is a qualified individual with a disability within the meaning of ADA/Section 504
element_definitions.notice: Defendant had notice of plaintiff's disability and need for accommodation
element_definitions.denial: Defendant denied the requested accommodation without engaging in the interactive process
element_definitions.resulting_harm: Plaintiff suffered harm as a result of the denial of accommodation

ada_accommodation.cross_count_pair_elements: (1) Agreement between two or more actors; (2) Unlawful act or unlawful means; (3) Overt acts in furtherance; (4) Malice (legal or actual); (5) Resulting harm

element_definitions.false_representation: Defendant made a false representation of a material fact
element_definitions.scienter: Defendant knew the representation was false or acted with reckless disregard for its truth
element_definitions.intent_to_induce: Defendant intended to induce plaintiff to rely on the false representation
element_definitions.justifiable_reliance: Plaintiff justifiably relied on the false representation
element_definitions.resulting_damages: Plaintiff suffered damages as a proximate result of such reliance

fraud_claim.cross_count_pair_elements: (1) Actual knowledge by official with authority to act; (2) Clearly unreasonable response (deliberate indifference); (3) Severe, pervasive, objectively offensive harassment; (4) Denial of equal educational access

element_definitions.agreement: Two or more persons agreed to commit an unlawful act or to accomplish a lawful end by unlawful means
element_definitions.unlawful_act: The conspiracy involved an underlying unlawful act or tort
element_definitions.overt_acts: One or more conspirators committed overt acts in furtherance of the conspiracy
element_definitions.malice: The conspirators acted with malice (legal or actual)
element_definitions.resulting_harm: Plaintiff suffered harm as a proximate result of the conspiracy

conspiracy_claim.cross_count_pair_elements: (1) Protected activity (reporting, opposing, or participating); (2) Adverse action that would deter a reasonable person; (3) Causal connection between protected activity and adverse action
